stemHtml: In case of excessive descent rate, the GPWS generates the following aural warnings…

options.b: “SINK RATE, SINK RATE” followed by “WHOOP WHOOP PULL UP” (twice).
options.c: “TERRAIN, TERRAIN” followed by “WHOOP WHOOP PULL UP” (twice).
options.d: “TOO LOW, TERRAIN” (twice) followed by “TOO LOW GEAR” (twice).
